# Copilot Instructions

- Use the repository-root `AGENTS.md` as the canonical instruction file for this project.
- Follow the architecture boundaries, commands, coding conventions, testing expectations, and security guardrails defined there.
- For deeper human-facing context, consult `README.md`, `docs/CONTRIBUTING.md`, and `DEPLOYMENT.md` instead of duplicating guidance here.
- If `AGENTS.md` and another instruction source diverge, align to the current codebase and `AGENTS.md` first.
